name: CONTRACT-BUG-24
title: bug-template.json uses _template_version while other templates use template_version
description: templates/bug-template.json declares _template_version (underscore) at line 2 while all other templates use template_version. Spec invariant 1 satisfied lexically by substring match but semantically inconsistent. Drop underscore or document.

history.note: Fixed Wave 3 batch 2: schema permissiveness, template fields, enforcement script corrections per Inv 22-33.
